title: Theo's Sleepy Feelings
synopsis: Little Theo learns to identify and comfort his bedtime feelings with gentle breathing and cozy rituals, discovering that all feelings are welcome at sleepy time.

pages.text: Theo sat on his soft bed, feeling many things at once. His tummy felt funny, and his heart beat fast. Sometimes bedtime brought big feelings that felt too wiggly to sleep.

illustration.description: A young boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes sitting on a cozy bed with rumpled blankets, soft watercolor style with dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars twinkling around him, gentle moonlight streaming through a window, ethereal atmosphere with pastel palette
illustration.alt: Theo sitting on his bed looking thoughtful with starlight around him

pages.text: "I feel excited about tomorrow," Theo whispered. "But I also feel worried about the dark." His feelings swirled like colorful clouds in his chest, each one important and real.

illustration.description: The same boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes surrounded by floating clouds in soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients with swirling pastel colors representing emotions, round sleepy face looking up at glowing stars, ethereal atmosphere
illustration.alt: Theo surrounded by colorful emotion clouds under starry sky

pages.text: Mama showed Theo how to breathe with the twinkling stars. "In like a balloon," she said softly. "Out like a gentle breeze." Theo's round blue eyes watched the stars dance as his breathing slowed.

illustration.description: A tender scene showing the boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes lying in bed with his mother beside him, both looking up at glowing stars, soft watercolor with dreamy purple and blue gradients, gentle moonlight, floating clouds, round sleepy faces, ethereal atmosphere with pastel palette
illustration.alt: Theo and Mama breathing together while watching stars

pages.text: With each breath, Theo felt his wiggly feelings settle down like sleepy butterflies. The worried feeling became smaller, and the excited feeling felt cozy instead of jumpy.

illustration.description: The boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes peacefully breathing, surrounded by gentle butterfly-like shapes in soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, floating clouds drifting slowly, round sleepy face becoming more relaxed, ethereal atmosphere
illustration.alt: Theo breathing calmly with butterfly-shaped feelings settling around him

pages.text: "All feelings are okay at bedtime," Mama said, tucking Theo in. "Happy feelings, worried feelings, excited feelings - they can all snuggle up with you." Theo smiled sleepily.

illustration.description: A cozy bedtime scene with the boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes being tucked into bed by his mother, soft watercolor with dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars above, gentle moonlight, floating clouds, both having round sleepy faces, ethereal atmosphere with pastel palette
illustration.alt: Theo being tucked into bed by Mama under starlight

pages.text: Now Theo felt peaceful and ready for dreams. His feelings were still there, but they felt gentle and calm, like friends keeping him company in the starry night.

illustration.description: The sleeping boy with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes peacefully asleep in his bed, surrounded by soft glowing stars and floating clouds, soft watercolor with dreamy purple and blue gradients, gentle moonlight casting a peaceful glow, round sleepy face completely relaxed, ethereal atmosphere with pastel palette
illustration.alt: Theo sleeping peacefully under a starry sky with gentle feelings around him

metadata.illustrationStyle: soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette

questions.question: How did Theo feel at bedtime?
questions.explanation: Theo felt many things at once - excited, worried, and other big feelings that made bedtime tricky.

questions.question: What did Mama teach Theo to do with the stars?
questions.explanation: Mama showed Theo how to breathe with the twinkling stars to help him feel calm.

questions.question: What did Mama say about feelings at bedtime?
questions.explanation: Mama told Theo that all feelings - happy, worried, excited - are okay at bedtime.

questions.question: How did Theo feel at the end?
questions.explanation: After breathing with the stars and talking with Mama, Theo felt peaceful and ready for sweet dreams.
